## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an "x" -->

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated the README.md (if needed)
- [ ] I have updated the API.md (if API changes)
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] I have added JSDoc comments for new functions
- [ ] I have updated relevant guides/tutorials

### Security

- [ ] I have checked for security vulnerabilities
- [ ] I have not introduced any hardcoded secrets
- [ ] I have validated all user inputs
- [ ] I have followed secure coding practices

### Performance

- [ ] I have considered performance implications
- [ ] I have tested with large datasets (if applicable)
- [ ] I have optimized database queries (if applicable)
- [ ] I have avoided memory leaks
